languages.text: {n}Техножрица поднимает вторую, еще целую аугментированную руку и касается когтями груди.{/n} "Слабая плоть внутри меня заменена освященным сервосердечным узлом. Он... очень громко стучит. Приходится перекрикивать".

{n}The Tech-Priest raises her other, still intact augmented hand and touches its claws to her chest.{/n} "The weak flesh within me has been replaced with a consecrated servo-heart node. It... beats very loudly. I am forced to shout over it."
languages.original_text: {n}Техножрица поднимает вторую, еще целую аугментированную руку и касается когтями груди.{/n} "Слабая плоть внутри меня заменена освященным сервосердечным узлом. Он... очень громко стучит. Приходится перекрикивать".

{n}The Tech-Priest raises her other, still intact augmented hand and touches its claws to her chest.{/n} "The weak flesh within me has been replaced with a consecrated servo-heart node. It... beats very loudly. I am forced to shout over it."

{n}The Tech-Priest raises her other, still intact augmented hand and touches its claws to her chest.{/n} "The weak flesh within me has been replaced with a consecrated servo-heart node. It... beats very loudly. I am forced to shout over it."

languages.text: {n}テクプリストは、まだ完好的な強化されたもう片方の腕を挙げ、その爪を胸に当てた。{/n}「私の弱き肉体は、聖なるサーボ心臓ノードに置き換えられた。それは...激しく鼓動する。その鼓動を上回るように、私は叫ぶことを余儀なくされる」
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest raises her other, still intact augmented hand and touches its claws to her chest.{/n} "The weak flesh within me has been replaced with a consecrated servo-heart node. It... beats very loudly. I am forced to shout over it."

traits.locale_text: テクプリストは、まだ完好的な強化されたもう片方の腕を挙げ、その爪を胸に当てた。「私の弱き肉体は、聖なるサーボ心臓ノードに置き換えられた。それは...激しく鼓動する。その鼓動を上回るように、私は叫ぶことを余儀なくされる。」

languages.text: {n}La tecnosacerdotisa levanta su otra mano aumentada, aún intacta, y se toca el pecho con sus garras.{/n} «La débil carne de mi interior ha sido reemplazada por un nodo de servocorazón consagrado... Late muy fuerte. Tengo que gritar por encima».
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest raises her other, still intact augmented hand and touches its claws to her chest.{/n} "The weak flesh within me has been replaced with a consecrated servo-heart node. It... beats very loudly. I am forced to shout over it."

traits.locale_text: {n}La tecnosacerdotisa levanta su otra mano aumentada, aún intacta, y se toca el pecho con sus garras.{/n} «La débil carne de mi interior ha sido reemplazada por un nodo de servocorazón consagrado... Late muy fuerte. Tengo que gritar por encima».

languages.text: {n}技术神甫抬起另一只完好的机械手，用爪尖触碰自己的胸膛。{/n}“我体内脆弱的血肉已被替换为圣化过的伺服心脏节点。它……跳动的声音非常响亮。我不得不提高音量以盖过它。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest raises her other, still intact augmented hand and touches its claws to her chest.{/n} "The weak flesh within me has been replaced with a consecrated servo-heart node. It... beats very loudly. I am forced to shout over it."

traits.locale_text: {n}技术神甫抬起另一只完好的机械手，用爪尖触碰自己的胸膛。{/n}“我体内脆弱的血肉已被替换为圣化过的伺服心脏节点。它……跳动的声音非常响亮。我不得不提高音量以盖过它。”

languages.text: {n}Die Techpriesterin hebt ihre noch intakte augmentierte Hand und fasst sich damit an die Brust.{/n} "Das schwache Fleisch in mir wurde durch den geweihten Servoherz-Knoten ersetzt. Er ... schlägt sehr laut. Ich muss schreien, um ihn zu übertönen."
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest raises her other, still intact augmented hand and touches its claws to her chest.{/n} "The weak flesh within me has been replaced with a consecrated servo-heart node. It... beats very loudly. I am forced to shout over it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Techpriesterin hebt ihre noch intakte augmentierte Hand und fasst sich damit an die Brust.{/n} "Das schwache Fleisch in mir wurde durch den geweihten Servoherz-Knoten ersetzt. Er ... schlägt sehr laut. Ich muss schreien, um ihn zu übertönen."

languages.text: {n}Tekno Rahip, hâlâ sağlam olan diğer ogmentli elini kaldırıp pençelerini göğsüne dokunduruyor.{/n} "İçimdeki zayıf et, kutsanmış bir hizkalp düğümüyle değiştirildi. O... Çok gürültülü atıyor. Onu bastırmak için bağırmak zorundayım."
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest raises her other, still intact augmented hand and touches its claws to her chest.{/n} "The weak flesh within me has been replaced with a consecrated servo-heart node. It... beats very loudly. I am forced to shout over it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tekno Rahip, hâlâ sağlam olan diğer ogmentli elini kaldırıp pençelerini göğsüne dokunduruyor.{/n} "İçimdeki zayıf et, kutsanmış bir hizkalp düğümüyle değiştirildi. O... Çok gürültülü atıyor. Onu bastırmak için bağırmak zorundayım."

languages.text: {n}La technoprêtresse lève son autre main augmentée encore intacte et touche sa poitrine de ses griffes.{/n} « La chair faible que contenait mon corps a été remplacée par un servonodule consacré. Il… bat extrêmement fort. Je suis obligée de crier pour couvrir son bruit. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest raises her other, still intact augmented hand and touches its claws to her chest.{/n} "The weak flesh within me has been replaced with a consecrated servo-heart node. It... beats very loudly. I am forced to shout over it."
